title: Projection layer and Markdown content parser
description:
Build the pure projection layer that normalizes an Issue into the canonical JSON shape all rules validate against, plus the content-parser trait and its Markdown implementation.

## Background

JSON Schema rules need a stable, normalized view of an issue. The projection is the foundation every other engine component depends on and must be pure (in `domain/`). This task also bumps the stale pulldown-cmark dependency. See `dev/active/f6a704d0-validation-engine-plan.md` ("The Projection contract") and decision record sections 6.1 and 6.2.

## Success Criteria

- [ ] [hard] `domain/projection.rs` defines a `Projection` struct (`#[derive(Serialize, JsonSchema)]`) and a pure `project()`; selector fields (type/state/priority/labels) are read without parsing the description.
- [ ] [hard] The projection groups labels by namespace (`labels.req = [...]`), exposes `type`/`state`/`priority`, `doc_types`, and a `sections` view parsed from the description.
- [ ] [hard] The `sections` projection is built LAZILY — only when a caller needs body content — so a write with no body-targeting rule never parses Markdown.
- [ ] [hard] The projection JSON shape is documented and its schemars-generated schema is asserted by a test as the stable contract user schemas depend on.
- [ ] [hard] `document/parser/mod.rs` defines a `ContentParser` trait (reusing `DocFormatAdapter::detect`) and `document/parser/markdown.rs` implements it.
- [ ] [hard] pulldown-cmark is bumped workspace-wide to 0.13.3 and the existing usages in `document/adapter.rs` and `link_validator.rs` are migrated (`Event::End(Tag)` -> `Event::End(TagEnd)`; `Tag::Heading` tuple -> struct); the whole workspace builds clean.
- [ ] [hard] Unit tests cover label grouping, lazy section/item extraction, and projection determinism.

## Notes

Anchors: `Issue` at `domain/types.rs:124-154`; `DocFormatAdapter` at `document/adapter.rs:24-51`; pulldown-cmark in `crates/jit/Cargo.toml` and `link_validator.rs`. In 0.13: `Tag::Heading { level, id, classes, attrs }`, ids/classes are `CowStr`. Keep the layer pure (decision record section 12).
